summary: End-to-end workflow for running quality assurance checks across agents, skills, and workflows.

inputs.name: audit_scope
inputs.description: Scope of the quality assurance audit (agents, skills, workflows, or all).

outputs.name: compliance_matrix
outputs.description: Matrix showing compliance status per artifact.

outputs.name: remediation_list
outputs.description: Prioritized list of items needing remediation.

budget.notes: Stay focused on quality assurance checks only.

gates.rule: Confirm the task is quality assurance, not code testing or security audit.
Require audit scope and quality criteria before checks begin.
QA report must include compliance matrix and remediation list.
Return QA report, compliance matrix, and remediation list.

steps.action: Scan for low-quality stubs and incomplete artifacts.
Evaluate dossier quality scores and provenance.
Run routing evaluation and gate passage checks.
Compile comprehensive QA report with compliance matrix.
Create prioritized remediation list based on findings.

tools.name: filesystem.read
tools.purpose: Read registry artifacts, dossiers, and evaluation results.

tools.name: filesystem.write
tools.purpose: Write QA report and remediation list.

verification.method: Check all items in audit scope were evaluated.
Verify compliance matrix is complete and accurate.
Check remediation list is prioritized by impact.

success_criteria: All items in audit scope evaluated.
Compliance matrix complete with pass/fail per artifact.

rollback.when: If audit scope was incomplete, restart with corrected scope.
